Accent Color.$description: Primary brand/accent color. Maps to Blue accent.

Disabled Light.$description: Disabled fill for primary buttons in light mode.

Disabled Dark.$description: Disabled fill for primary buttons in dark mode.

Accent Hover state Light.$description: Hover state of the accent color in light mode.

Accent Hover state Dark.$description: Hover state of the accent color in dark mode.

Other Hover.$description: General hover overlay (20% opacity blue). Light mode only.

BG-Primary-Default.$description: Default page and panel background. Used in Explorer, Settings.

BG-Primary-Grey.$description: Slightly off-white background for contrast areas.

BG-Primary-Subtle.$description: Subtle tinted background for cards and inset areas.

BG-Primary-Raised.$description: Raised surface background, one level above Default.

Text On AccentColor.$description: Text placed on top of accent-coloured surfaces (e.g. primary button label).

Secondary.$description: Border for secondary button default state.

Secondary Disabled.$description: Border for secondary button disabled state.

Stroke 3.$description: Emphasis border — focused inputs, selected states.

BG-Primary 2.$description: Subtle card background for nested content.

BG-Primary 3.$description: Card background on grey page surfaces.

BG-Primary 4.$description: Raised card background, one level above Default.

Error.$description: Error state fill and text colour.

Always White.$description: Always white regardless of theme — e.g. logo on coloured bg.

Hover.$description: Generic hover overlay for interactive elements.

sideNavBarBg.$description: Side navigation bar background in light mode.

sideBarBgHover.$description: Side navigation item hover background in light mode.

BG-Primary-Default.$description: Default page and panel background in dark mode. Used in Explorer, Settings.

BG-Primary-Grey.$description: Slightly off-dark background for contrast areas.

BG-Primary-Subtle.$description: Subtle surface background for cards and inset areas in dark mode.

BG-Primary-Raised.$description: Raised surface background in dark mode, one level above Default.

Text Primary.$description: Primary body text and headings in dark mode.

Text Description.$description: Secondary/description text, captions, metadata in dark mode.

Text Disabled.$description: Disabled state text in dark mode.

Text Placeholder.$description: Input placeholder text in dark mode.

Text On AccentColor.$description: Text on accent-coloured surfaces in dark mode (e.g. primary button label).

Primary Disabled.$description: Disabled primary button background in dark mode.

Secondary Disabled.$description: Disabled secondary button background in dark mode.

Secondary.$description: Secondary button background in dark mode.

Input Fill.$description: Text input field background in dark mode.

Accent Hover.$description: Primary button hover background in dark mode.

ON OFF.$description: Toggle switch inactive track fill in dark mode.

ON OFF Disabled.$description: Toggle switch disabled track fill in dark mode.

Secondary.$description: Border for secondary button default state in dark mode.

Secondary Disabled.$description: Border for secondary button disabled state in dark mode.

Stroke 2.$description: Default card and input border in dark mode.

Stroke 3.$description: Emphasis border in dark mode — focused inputs, selected states.

Stroke Disabled.$description: Disabled input/element border in dark mode.

Text Link.$description: Hyperlink text colour in dark mode.

Button Primary.$description: CTA button inside notification banners in dark mode.

textSecondary.$description: Secondary text inside notification banners in dark mode.

Text Disabled.$description: Disabled text inside notification banners in dark mode.

BG-Primary.$description: Default card background in dark mode.

BG-Primary 2.$description: Nested card background in dark mode.

BG-Primary 3.$description: Card background on dark page surfaces.

BG-Primary 4.$description: Raised card background in dark mode.

Error.$description: Error state fill and text colour in dark mode.

Always White.$description: Always white regardless of theme — e.g. logo on coloured bg.

Link Disabled.$description: Disabled hyperlink colour in dark mode.

Hover.$description: Generic hover overlay for interactive elements in dark mode.

S.$description: Small drop shadow in dark mode.

M.$description: Medium drop shadow in dark mode.

L.$description: Large drop shadow in dark mode.

Tooltip.$description: Tooltip background colour in dark mode.

sideNavBarBg.$description: Side navigation bar background in dark mode.

sideBarBgHover.$description: Side navigation item hover background in dark mode.
